_publications._publicationTitle: Dopamine deficiency underlies learning deficits in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: direct measurements of hippocampal dopamine levels ( Fig. 1B ) and DARPP32 phosphorylation ( Fig. 1D ) reveal a 20% and 61% reduction in CKO mice relative to control mice
details: 20% reduction in hippocampal dopamine levels compared to control mice
